title: Sapphire Mod
description: This mod adds Sapphires, sapphire armor, tools, blocks and more into Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds Sapphires, sapphire blocks, sapphire ores and armor and tools into the game of Minecraft. This Mod is currently in development. When the next few updates come out there should be functionality, blocks, and more.  This mod is only for Forge and NeoForge Minecraft. The fabric version may come later if i can. If you like this mod consider following so you can get notification when we update this.

the 1.21 Forgwe will be coming out soon i am working on updating the 1.20.1 version with armor, tools, and ore generation
